title: Renew a short-term access token
content:
Use this endpoint to renew a short-term access token by `refresh_token`. A short-term access token is a type of token that you can obtain after receiving authorization from a TikTok account. The token expires in one day. ## Before you start Obtain a refresh token for generating a new short-term token using [/tt_user/oauth2/token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1833997638479041). ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/tt_user/oauth2/refresh_token/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.
Allowed format: `application/json`. | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| | client_id {Required} | string | ID of your developer app.

To find the App ID, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information.| | client_secret {Required} | string | Secret of your developer app.

To find the Secret, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information. | | grant_type {Required} | string | The way of generating the access token.

The allowed enum value:
  • `refresh_token`: To generate the access token by refresh token.
| | refresh_token {Required} | string | Refresh token to renew an existing access token.

You can obtain the refresh token in the response of [/tt_user/oauth2/token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1833997638479041) endpoint when you generate an access token. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/tt_user/oauth2/refresh_token/' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "client_id":"{{client_id}}", "client_secret":"{{client_secret}}", "grant_type":"refresh_token", "refresh_token":"{{refresh_token}}" }' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data|object|Returned data.| |request_id|string| The log ID of the request, which uniquely identifies a request.| #|access_token | string | The new short-term token for permission verification.

The token expires in one day. | #|token_type | string | The type of token.

Enum value:
  • `Bearer`: Bearer token. Anyone in possession of the token can use it to access the associated resources.
| #|scope | string | The scope of permissions granted to the access token. | #|expires_in | number | The time remaining until the access token expires, measured in seconds. | #|refresh_token | string | The refresh token, which can be used to renew the access token.

The refresh token is valid for one year.

Note: Retain this field for `access_token` renewal. | #|refresh_token_expires_in | number | The time remaining until the refresh token expires, measured in seconds. | #|open_id | string | Application specific unique ID of the TikTok account. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "access_token": "{{access_token}}", "expires_in": 86400, "open_id": "{{open_id}}", "refresh_token": "{{refresh_token}}", "refresh_token_expires_in": 28484364, "scope": "message.list.manage,video.list,video.insights,user.insights,user.info.basic,comment.list,biz.brand.insights,biz.spark.auth,tcm.order.update,comment.list.manage,video.upload,video.publish,biz.ads.recommend,user.account.type,biz.creator.info,user.info.username,message.list.send,user.info.profile,user.info.stats,message.list.read,biz.creator.insights", "token_type": "Bearer" } } (/code) ```
